data.title: Storebrand Boosts Management Ownership Through Share-Based Remuneration
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Storebrand ASA ( (GB:0NO0) ) just unveiled an update.

Storebrand ASA has transferred 90,064 treasury shares to members of its management as part of its remuneration scheme in which a portion of executive pay is settled in equity at a price of NOK 176.56 per share. Following these transactions, the company holds 11,823,447 of its own shares, corresponding to 2.72% of its share capital, underscoring ongoing use of share-based incentives to align management with shareholder interests.

The awards increased the individual shareholdings of several primary insiders, including chief executive Odd Arild Grefstad and other senior executives, further consolidating management’s ownership stake in the group. The move signals Storebrand’s continued reliance on equity-linked compensation as a tool for retention and alignment, which may support governance standards and investor confidence in the Nordic financial group’s long-term strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0NO0) stock is a Sell with a NOK150.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Storebrand ASA stock, see the GB:0NO0 Stock Forecast page.

More about Storebrand ASA

Storebrand ASA is a Nordic financial group focused on insurance, pensions, savings and other financial services aimed at delivering security and financial wellness for individuals and companies. The company emphasizes sustainable solutions and long-term economic decision-making, serves about 61,000 corporate and 2.6 million individual customers, manages NOK 1,609 billion in assets and is headquartered at Lysaker near Oslo, with its shares listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker STB.

Average Trading Volume: 655,234

Current Market Cap: NOK75.89B

data.title: Cresud Announces Final Warrant Exercise Window and Cashless Option
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Cresud Sociedad ( (CRESY) ).

On February 18, 2026, Cresud informed investors that the final exercise window for its share warrants will run from February 17 to February 25, 2026, with intermediaries such as Caja de Valores potentially imposing earlier internal cut-off dates for receiving exercise instructions. Each warrant entitles the holder to receive 1.5417 common shares with a par value of ARS 1 at an exercise price of USD 0.3669 per share, allowing warrant holders to finalize their position in Cresud equity.

For this last exercise period, the company is offering a “Net Exercise with Par Value Contribution” cashless alternative approved at the shareholders’ meeting on October 30, 2025, under which holders receive shares equal to the difference between the cash exercise price and the reference market value while paying only the ARS 1 par value per share. In the case of converting common shares into ADSs, investors will also pay the ADS issuance fee of USD 0.05 per ADS, a structure that could ease capital outlay for warrant holders and potentially support an increase in Cresud’s outstanding share capital and market liquidity.

The most recent analyst rating on (CRESY) stock is a Hold with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cresud Sociedad stock, see the CRESY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CRESY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CRESY is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by attractive valuation (very low P/E and high dividend yield) alongside improving recent operating and cash-flow performance. This is tempered by elevated leverage and historical volatility, and near-term technicals that remain weak versus short-term moving averages.

To see Spark’s full report on CRESY stock, click here.

More about Cresud Sociedad

Cresud Sociedad Anónima, Comercial, Inmobiliaria, Financiera y Agropecuaria (Cresud Inc. in English) is an Argentine company listed on Nasdaq and BYMA that operates across agricultural, real estate, financial and related businesses. Through its diversified portfolio, Cresud provides investors exposure to Argentina’s agribusiness and property sectors, with its shares also represented by ADSs in international markets.

data.title: Satellos to Host February 24 Virtual KOL Event Showcasing SAT-3247 in Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Satellos Bioscience ( (TSE:MSCL) ) has provided an announcement.

On February 18, 2026, Satellos Bioscience Inc. announced it will host a virtual key opinion leader event on February 24, 2026, featuring neuromuscular expert Dr. Kevin M. Flanigan to discuss the unmet need and current treatment landscape in Duchenne muscular dystrophy. The event will highlight clinical progress for SAT-3247, including Phase 1a/b data in healthy volunteers and adults with DMD, the TRAILHEAD open-label adult study, and the BASECAMP randomized Phase 2 pediatric trial, underscoring Satellos’ efforts to position SAT-3247 as a potentially disease-modifying, dystrophin-independent therapy in a competitive DMD market.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MSCL) stock is a Buy with a C$16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Satellos Bioscience stock, see the TSE:MSCL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:MSCL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:MSCL is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, large losses, and heavy cash burn with ongoing funding risk). Technicals are supportive due to a clear uptrend, but overbought signals temper that strength. Valuation is also constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MSCL stock, click here.

More about Satellos Bioscience

Satellos Bioscience Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing orally administered small molecule medicines to restore natural muscle repair and regeneration in degenerative muscle diseases. Its lead candidate, SAT-3247, targets the AAK1 protein to address disrupted muscle stem-cell signaling in Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) and is being evaluated in ongoing Phase 2 clinical trials in adult and pediatric patients.

data.title: Hansa Biopharma Wins FDA Review Acceptance for Imlifidase Kidney Transplant Therapy
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Hansa Biopharma AB ( (SE:HNSA) ) is now available.

Hansa Biopharma has had its Biologics License Application for imlifidase accepted for review by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration, a key regulatory milestone for its first-in-class IgG-cleaving enzyme therapy. The filing is backed by pivotal Phase 3 ConfIdeS data showing significantly improved kidney function and dialysis independence in highly sensitized kidney transplant patients, potentially strengthening Hansa’s position in transplant medicine and expanding treatment options for those who struggle to receive compatible organs.

Imlifidase, already conditionally approved as IDEFIRIX in several European markets as well as in Australia and Switzerland, is designed to rapidly inactivate donor-specific antibodies to enable HLA-incompatible kidney transplantation. The FDA’s acceptance of the application, supported by a generally well-tolerated safety profile and long-term follow-up commitments, underscores regulatory momentum that could translate into broader global adoption and greater access for end-stage renal disease patients facing long wait times for transplantation.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:HNSA) stock is a Hold with a SEK40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hansa Biopharma AB stock, see the SE:HNSA Stock Forecast page.

More about Hansa Biopharma AB

Hansa Biopharma AB is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel immunomodulatory therapies for acute and complex immune disorders. Its proprietary IgG‑cleaving enzyme platform underpins products such as imlifidase (IDEFIRIX), aimed at enabling kidney transplantation in highly sensitized patients, and a next-generation candidate for Guillain‑Barré Syndrome, with operations in Europe and the U.S.

Average Trading Volume: 538,162

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK4.07B

For a thorough assessment of HNSA stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from Funding Circle Holdings ( (GB:FCH) ).

Funding Circle Holdings has continued its share buy-back programme, repurchasing 17,891 ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange on 18 February 2026 at a volume-weighted average price of 153.8452 pence. The transaction, executed via Investec Bank, forms part of the capital management initiative first announced in May 2025.

The company will hold the repurchased shares in treasury, bringing its treasury stock to 3,969,230 shares and leaving 300,772,346 ordinary shares in issue carrying voting rights. The updated share count provides the new denominator for investors assessing disclosure thresholds under UK transparency rules, modestly enhancing earnings per share potential for remaining shareholders over time.

data.title: Gladstone Investment Issues $115 Million in Unsecured Notes
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Gladstone Investment ( (GAIN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Gladstone Investment Corporation has issued up to $115 million of 7.125% unsecured notes due May 1, 2031, under a supplemental indenture executed with UMB Bank on February 18, 2026. The notes, which closed the same day, rank pari passu with the company’s existing unsecured debt, pay interest quarterly beginning May 1, 2026, and are redeemable at par on or after May 1, 2028.

Proceeds from the offering will be used to repay a portion of borrowings under Gladstone Investment’s credit facility, fund new investment opportunities and for general corporate purposes, with the company planning to re-borrow under the facility to continue investing in portfolio companies as conditions permit. The indenture also imposes covenants tying leverage and reporting obligations to Investment Company Act standards, providing noteholders with structural protections while supporting the firm’s ongoing growth strategy in the lower middle-market financing space.

The most recent analyst rating on (GAIN) stock is a Buy with a $15.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Gladstone Investment stock, see the GAIN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GAIN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GAIN is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by financial performance—especially the sharp swing to negative TTM operating/free cash flow and declining revenue—despite strong reported margins. Valuation is a major offset with a low P/E and high dividend yield, while technicals are mildly supportive and the earnings call/corporate event indicate improving NAV and funding flexibility but continued expense and credit-quality risks.

To see Spark’s full report on GAIN stock, click here.

More about Gladstone Investment

Gladstone Investment Corporation is a publicly traded business development company that provides debt and equity financing to lower middle-market businesses in the U.S. The company focuses on supporting management buyouts, recapitalizations and growth financings, generating income through interest on its portfolio investments and capital gains from equity stakes.

data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Heritage Distilling Holding Company ( (IPST) ) has shared an announcement.

On February 17, 2026, IP Strategy Holdings, Inc., formerly Heritage Distilling Holding Company, Inc., filed a Third Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation in Delaware to change its corporate name, effective February 18, 2026. The board simultaneously approved amended and restated bylaws to align with the new name, while the company’s common stock continued trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the unchanged IPST ticker and CUSIP.

In a February 18, 2026 press release, the company said the rebranding to IP Strategy Holdings underscores its shift toward programmable intellectual property and AI-native data networks, including its $IP token treasury and validator role in the Story network ecosystem. Nasdaq is expected to reflect the new name on its platform from February 19, 2026, signaling a formal pivot from its heritage distilling identity to a digital IP-focused strategy for public market investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (IPST) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Heritage Distilling Holding Company stock, see the IPST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IPST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IPST is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak technicals (strong downtrend and bearish momentum) and cash flow challenges, despite a stable low-leverage balance sheet and improving profitability metrics. Positive corporate events (reduced dilution risk and operational progress) provide support but are not enough to outweigh the technical and cash-flow risks.

To see Spark’s full report on IPST stock, click here.

More about Heritage Distilling Holding Company

IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: IPST) is positioned in the emerging programmable intellectual property and blockchain-enabled data networks space. The company is the first Nasdaq-listed firm to hold $IP tokens as a primary reserve asset and operate a validator for the Story Protocol, giving public market investors regulated equity exposure to the $80 trillion programmable IP economy through its $IP token treasury tied to on-chain IP registration, licensing, and monetization.

Tian Ruixiang Holdings ( (TIRX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings Ltd, a Beijing-based insurance broker focused on distributing property, casualty, health and life insurance products in China, operates via a China-based variable interest entity. Its portfolio spans commercial property, liability, accident and automobile policies, alongside broader health, life and miscellaneous coverage across the Chinese market.

At its annual general meeting on February 17, 2026, shareholders overwhelmingly approved a sharp increase in authorized share capital to US$3.75 billion and granted the board wide discretion to conduct reverse share splits. Following the vote, the board implemented a 1-for-50 reverse split of both Class A and Class B shares, consolidating the share base and rounding any fractional entitlements up, a move that is likely aimed at supporting the company’s Nasdaq listing compliance and capital-raising flexibility as further details on timing and identifiers are still to be announced.

Polar Capital Holdings has repurchased 20,000 of its 2.5p ordinary shares on 18 February 2026 under its ongoing share buyback programme, at prices between 631p and 637p and a volume-weighted average price of 633.5121p. The shares, bought through Deutsche Numis, will be cancelled, reducing the company’s share count and leaving 101,137,185 ordinary shares in issue, a move that may enhance earnings per share and slightly increase existing shareholders’ voting stakes.

The latest announcement is out from Maven Income and Growth VCT 5 ( (GB:MIG5) ).

Maven Income and Growth VCT 5 PLC has admitted 13,399,375 new ordinary shares of 10p each to trading on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, issued under its ongoing offer for subscription. The new shares are fully fungible with the existing stock, taking the total number of ordinary shares in issue to 253,641,645 as of 18 February 2026, which expands the company’s capital base and potentially broadens its investor pool while supporting further investment activity.

The admission follows a prospectus dated 2 October 2025 and covers all share admissions up to and including 18 February 2026 under this offer. By increasing the volume of listed securities and confirming compliance with the Public Offers and Admissions to Trading Regulations 2024, the company reinforces its access to public equity markets and provides existing and new shareholders with enhanced liquidity in its shares.
